query: smeared blurred face featureless dissolved portrait abstraction
message: sub:bad_or_no_details/smeared_face — anti_aesthetic — dissolved portraits, featureless faces, painterly distortions

response.objective_caption: A black and white photograph showing a human face in the lower left portion of the frame against a predominantly dark background. A bright vertical band runs along the right edge. The subject's head is turned slightly toward the camera, with highlights visible on the forehead and cheek. Large areas of deep shadow fill the upper and surrounding portions of the composition.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A black and white photograph employing intentional blur to render a human face as a ghostly, indistinct form in the lower left corner, with the subject partially cut off by the frame edge. Extreme underexposure crushes most of the image into deep shadow, leaving only a bright vertical streak on the right side to break the darkness. The composition evokes atmospheric distress and unease through its smeared textures, withheld detail, and oppressive tonal weight.
